I play with self attention mod, cross attention mod, freeU adv., dynamicThresholding, and play loop iteration stuff. Point is the similarity of output face and variance style from noise is poorly generated. You can tell very easily when see the result and guessing what did it build from not 100% but to guess main base model is not hard.
- assistant: You're in the tricky territory of inference-time interventions where you can shift behavior without retraining, but you're hitting the fundamental constraint: **you can't generate what wasn't in the training distribution without actually retraining**.
- Self-attention and cross-attention modifications let you reweight existing features and guide generation, but they're working with the latent space the base model already learned. If the base model's face generation and style variance were built from specific data, you're essentially redistributing probability across those learned modes—you can't create entirely new modes. FreeU helps with structure preservation, dynamic thresholding tightens the sampling distribution, and iteration loops compound these effects, but they're all navigating the same learned manifold.
